_comment: P2 calibration config for the 5 starter combo templates. Consumed by the hedge classifier in template mode (see hedge-classifier.md). 'price' (implied prob of the adverse outcome) is NOT here - it comes live from the connectors. moveAdverse/confidence/sigmaOther are the P2-owned calibration knobs.

templates.thesis: Long defense; risk = a peace-favoring / incumbent-change outcome cuts defense budgets.
templates.note: Budget impact lags the event -> sentiment hedge more than cash-flow hedge.

templates.thesis: Long a single biopharma name into a binary FDA / Phase-3 readout.
templates.note: Cleanest template - equity and contract resolve on the same readout date.

templates.thesis: Long broad shipping / logistics; risk = a Strait of Hormuz blockade disrupts routes and hits a selloff.
templates.note: Sign is instrument-dependent: pure tankers (STNG/FRO) RISE on a blockade, so for them the adverse leg flips to 'blocked NO'.

templates.thesis: Long rate-sensitive equities (regional banks); risk = the next FOMC holds/hikes instead of cutting.
templates.note: Small move but very clean fixed-date timing; good 'macro hedge' example.

templates.thesis: Long crypto-proxy equities (COIN/MSTR); risk = key market-structure legislation (e.g. CLARITY) stalls.
templates.note: Mirrors a real institutional trade (funds have hedged legislative risk via these contracts). Legislative timelines slip -> flag poor alignment.
